unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Try again later or contact support.
reset_link_expired: The password could not be reset. Probably the reset link from your email has expired.
password_saved: Your new password has been saved.
close_window: You can now close this window.
confirm_email_success: Thank you for confirming your email address!
confirm_email_failed: Your email address could not be confirmed. Probably the link from your email has expired.
invalid_credentials: The email address or password is incorrect.
account_inactive: Your account is no longer active.
account_blocked: Your account is temporarily blocked because you entered a wrong password too many times. Try again later.
signup_intro: Create your Detox@Home remote care manager account to securely access your care and linked devices.
password_too_short: The password must be at least 6 characters
no_repeat_password_match: The passwords are not the same
create_account_email_exists: A user with this email address already exists
home_title: Secure support for care at home
home_subtitle: A workspace for Detox@Home care teams to connect patient phones and (remotely) manage their tasks
home_intro: Use the remote care manager to sign in, review your account, and connect the Detox@Home mobile experience.
home_platform_body: The Detox@Home remote care manager includes components from the original SenSeeAct software, whose license is acknowledged on the platform information page.
remote_task_editor_select_patient_copy: Choose the linked patient whose remote task set you want to review or update.
remote_task_editor_refresh_copy: A phone refresh starts automatically when you select a patient. Use these actions only if you need to retry that refresh or fall back to the latest server copy.
remote_task_editor_edit_copy: Review the task list on the left and adjust the selected task details on the right.
remote_task_editor_empty_detail: Select a patient and choose a task to edit.
remote_task_editor_publish_copy: When the draft looks right, publish the new task snapshot for the selected patient and linked devices.
remote_task_editor_forbidden: This page is only available for professionals and admins.
remote_task_editor_load_subjects_failed: Could not load linked Detox patients.
remote_task_editor_status_no_patients: No linked Detox patients are available for task editing.
remote_task_editor_status_select_patient: Select a linked patient to start an edit session.
remote_task_editor_status_resolving_ons: Resolving linked Detox patient from ONS...
remote_task_editor_error_no_patient_from: No linked Detox patient was returned for this ONS link.
remote_task_editor_error_open_ons_patien: The linked Detox patient could not be opened in the task editor.
remote_task_editor_error_ons_resolve: The ONS-linked patient could not be resolved.
remote_task_editor_error_ons_not_linked: No Detox patient is linked to this ONS record yet.
remote_task_editor_error_ons_forbidden: You do not have access to open this linked Detox patient.
remote_task_editor_confirm_switch_patien: Switching patients will lose all non-published changes for the current patient. Continue?
remote_task_editor_confirm_retry_phone_r: Retrying the phone refresh will replace the current draft with the latest tasks from the linked phone. Continue?
remote_task_editor_confirm_use_server_sn: Open the latest middleware snapshot and lose all non-published changes in the current draft?
remote_task_editor_error_load_snapshot: Could not load the latest middleware snapshot.
remote_task_editor_warning_no_push_fallb: No task push registration is known for this patient. Waiting briefly for a pull-based refresh, then falling back to the latest middleware snapshot.
remote_task_editor_status_request_phone: Requesting the linked phone to upload its latest tasks...
remote_task_editor_warning_refresh_reque: Could not create an app refresh request. Using the latest middleware snapshot instead.
remote_task_editor_warning_phone_timeout: The linked phone did not upload a fresh task set in time. Editing continues from the latest middleware snapshot, which may be stale.
remote_task_editor_warning_refresh_check: The app refresh check failed. Editing continues from the latest middleware snapshot.
remote_task_editor_error_parse_xml: The stored task XML could not be parsed: {{message}}
remote_task_editor_warning_restored_stal: A saved draft was restored, but a newer task snapshot now exists on the server. Reload latest before publishing, then re-apply the draft manually.
remote_task_editor_warning_restored_draf: An unsaved draft was restored for this patient.
remote_task_editor_list_empty: No tasks are available in the current snapshot.
remote_task_editor_status_check_publish: Checking for newer task snapshots before publish...
remote_task_editor_warning_publish_block: A newer task snapshot was published while you were editing. Your draft has been preserved locally, but publish is blocked until you reload the latest version.
remote_task_editor_error_serialize_xml: Could not serialize the current draft to XML: {{message}}
remote_task_editor_warning_publish_succe: Task snapshot published. Waiting for linked devices to sync the new version.
remote_task_editor_error_refetch_before_: Could not refetch the latest snapshot before publish.
remote_task_editor_validation_missing_re: Each task needs at least a name and request text.
remote_task_editor_validation_max_per_da: Maximum requests per day must be an integer.
remote_task_editor_validation_min_interv: Minimum interval must be an integer.
remote_task_editor_warning_watch_update: A newer app or web task snapshot arrived while this editor was open. Reload latest before publishing.
link_phone_intro: Generate a QR code to link a phone.
link_phone_already_linked: Please note: another device was already linked.
link_phone_scan_instruction: Scan this QR code with the Detox@Home app to link the phone.
link_phone_forbidden: You are not allowed to link a phone for ONS.
email_address_pending_verification_1: You have changed your email address and a confirmation mail was sent to your new address:
email_address_pending_verification_2: The change will only become active after you have confirmed the new address.
no_repeat_new_password_match: The new passwords are not the same
mfa_intro: Secure your account with extra verification through your phone.
mfatype_intro: Select the verification method. You can also add multiple methods, so that one can function as a recovery in case you are locked out from another method.
mfatype_totp_explanation: Use an authenticator app such as Google or Microsoft Authenticator, 2FAS or Authy. This is the most secure option. We will not need your phone number. But if you lose your authenticator app, you will be locked out from your account.
mfatype_sms_explanation: Receive a code through SMS. This is the easiest option and you will not be locked out from your account as long as you have access to your phone number. But this means that we need to know your phone number.
mfa_add_totp_install_authenticator: Install an authenticator app on your phone. We suggest Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 2FAS or Authy.
mfa_add_totp_scan_qr: In your authenticator app, scan the following QR code.
mfa_add_totp_enter_code: Then enter the code that you see here.
mfa_error_type_totp_max:
You have already added verification with an authenticator app.
If you want to use another authenticator app, you can just scan the same QR code in your new app. Click the icon at the existing verification to see the QR code again.
Alternatively, you can delete the current verification and then add a new one.
mfa_error_type_sms_max:
You cannot add more phone numbers for SMS verification.
If you want to use another number, you should first delete one of the existing numbers.
mfa_error_sms_already_exists: You have already added SMS verification with this phone number.
mfa_error_add_max: You have reached the maximum number of attempts to add a verification method. You can try it again later.
mfa_error_verify_max: You have reached the maximum number of attempts to verify a code. You can try it again later.
mfa_error_add_verify_max: You have entered a wrong code too many times.
mfa_confirm_delete: Are you sure that you want to delete this verification?
mfa_verify_totp_instruct: Open the authenticator app on your phone and look up the verification code for remote care manager. Enter the code below.
mfa_verify_sms_instruct: We have sent a verification code by SMS to your phone number. Enter the code below.
info_intro: Detox@Home remote care manager is the branded web interface for this service. It includes components from the original SenSeeAct software, whose license is acknowledged below.

admin_ons_cleanup_intro: Remove messages from both detox queues after ONS accepts them.
admin_ons_cleanup_confirm_enable: Enable automatic cleanup of accepted ONS messages?
admin_ons_cleanup_confirm_disable: Disable automatic cleanup of accepted ONS messages?
start_download_empty: You are not a member of a project where you can download data.
